message:
feat: add automated response actions to doctor dog health monitor (gt-nek89)

The doctor dog previously only reported health data ("thermometer").
Now it also takes automated actions when thresholds are exceeded:
- Restart server if TCP unreachable
- Escalate to Mayor if query latency > 5s
- Trigger janitor cleanup if database count > 20 (orphan accumulation)
- Trigger backup sync if backup stale > 1 hour

Each action has a 10-minute cooldown to prevent action storms.
Actions are skipped when check results contain errors.
